properties.name: jwt-config.JWT_-eXPIRY
properties.description: JWT token validity duration in milliseconds.

properties.name: jwt-config.JWT_-pUBLIC_-kEY
properties.description: PEM-encoded RSA public key used to verify JWT signatures.

properties.name: jwt-config.JWT_-pRIVATE_-kEY
properties.description: PEM-encoded RSA private key used to sign JWT tokens.

properties.name: brevo-config.BREVO_-uRL
properties.description: Brevo SMTP email API endpoint URL.

properties.name: brevo-config.BREVO_API_KEY
properties.description: Brevo API key used to authenticate email API requests.
